productName: Fugu - T1 - Hash Rosin - Sunset Sherbet - (DOH) - 1g
description: Solventless hybrid hash rosin crafted in two patient steps from Sunset Shebert: an ice-water hash wash followed by a low-temp press into rich, fragrant rosin. The cleanest expression of the strain — a balanced, sweet-earthy profile, with a smooth, well-rounded vibe.
